---
title: "Legacy ETL Compiler"
author: "Your Name / Data Science Team"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: revealjs
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

## Overview

- Purpose: migrate SPSS/PSPP logic into R pipelines
- Verification & validation cycle

---

## Architecture

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph Parser & Topology
      A[SPSS/PSPP Script] --> B(GraphBuilder)
      B --> C[Raw Topology YAML]
    end
    subgraph Optimizer
      C --> D[Optimized Topology YAML]
    end
    subgraph Code Generation
      D --> E[R Generator]
      E --> F[Pipeline.R]
    end
    subgraph Verification
      A --> G[PSPP]
      F --> H[Rscript]
    end
```

---

## State Machine

- Operations = nodes
- States = datasets
- Enables dependency checking & optimizations

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[GET DATA] --> B[SORT CASES]
    B --> C[COMPUTE age_group <- age/10]
    C --> D[RECODE age_group]
```

---

## Environment Considerations

- Linux (Rscript + PSPP easily installed)
- Windows: R via VS Code, PSPP absent -> configurable commands or skip

---

## Usage

```bash
python src/compiler.py --manifest demo/input/logic.sps \
  --pspp-cmd "echo PSPP skipped" \
  --rscript-cmd Rscript
```

---

## Questions?

*Detailed notes available in `docs/system_explanation.qmd`.*
